name: All-Day Macaroni and Cheese
recipeIngredient: 3 cups sharp Cheddar cheese, shredded (12 ounces)
1 cup sharp Cheddar cheese, shredded (4 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cooked macaroni in a 3-1/2 quart (or larger) slow cooker coated with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Add 3 cups cheese, milk, eggs, and seasonings to the macaroni; mix well.
3. Sprinkle with the remaining 1 cup cheese.
4. Cover and cook on the low setting for 5 to 6 hours or until the mixture is firm and golden around the edges.
5. Do not remove the cover or stir until the mixture has finished cooking.
Serves: 4 to 6
